def write_memory(identity: dict, memory_type: str, subject: str,
                 content: str,
                 subtype:  Optional[str] = None,
                 tags:     Optional[list] = None,
                 project:  Optional[str] = None) -> dict:
    """
    Write a new memory entry to the canonical store.

    Audit record is written FIRST. If audit write fails, the operation
    does not execute and returns an error.

    Args:
        identity:    Agent identity object from Phase 9E.1 load_agent()
        memory_type: personal | shared | project | historical | story
        subject:     One-line summary of the memory
        content:     Full memory content
        subtype:     Type-specific subtype (optional)
        tags:        List of topic tags (optional)
        project:     Project name for project memory (optional)

    Returns:
        result dict with success, memory_id, audit_id, error
    """
    agent = identity["agent"]["name"]
    mid   = _make_memory_id(memory_type, agent, subtype)
    entry = _make_entry(mid, memory_type, agent, subject, content,
                        subtype=subtype, tags=tags, project=project)
